title: 4 Pcs Magnetic Pickup Tool, Portable Telescopic Magnetic Pick Up Tool with Non-Slip Handle, Telescopic Magnet, Flexible Magnetic Pick Up Stick for Picking Up Screws and Nuts (1.5LB 3LB 5LB 10LB)
features: 【Telescopic Magnetic Pick-up Tool Set】You will receive 1pc black 1.5lbs magnetic pickup tool, 1pc 3lbs flexible magnetic pickups, 1pc 5lbs magnetic retractable pickups, 1pc 10lbs magnetic retractable pickups for various scenarios.

【High Quality Material】This magnetic pick up tool is made of high quality stainless steel and magnet, high strength, sturdy and durable, not easy to scratch or break, rust-proof, long service life, whether for daily home use or professional maintenance, it can stand up to the test.

【Flexible Bending】The 3lb magnetic pickup is equipped with a bendable shaft, the angle can be adjusted according to the need, easy to cope with curved or complex pickup paths, improve work efficiency.

【Easy to Carry】Designed to be lightweight and portable, these telescopic magnetic pickup tools can be easily carried in the pockets of your shirt, trousers or backpack. Ideal for picking up small metal objects such as paper clips, staples, batteries, needles, screws, etc. from tight spaces.

【Wide Applications】Magnetic pick-up tools are suitable for automotive assembly plants, textile workshops, households, and office settings. They can pick up various metal components such as screws, nuts, bolts, fish hooks, nails, keys, and nail clippers.
description: Set Contents 1×1.5lb magnetic pick up tool 1×3lb bendable magnetic pick up tool 1×5lb magnetic pick up tool 1×10lb magnetic pick up tool Specification Colour: black Material: stainless steel Stretch range: -1.5lbs: 11.7~49.5cm/4.6~19.4in -3lbs: 55cm/21.6in -5lbs: 14~61.5cm/5.51~24.2in -10lbs: 17~66.5cm/6.69~26.1in Features 1. Strong magnetic attraction, easy to pick up small metal objects. 2. Telescopic design, adjustable length, easy to use. 3. Some models can be bent to adapt to complex spaces. 4. Made of stainless steel, sturdy and durable, rust and corrosion resistant. 5. The handle is ergonomically designed for a comfortable grip. 6. The tool is lightweight and compact, easy to carry and storage. 7. Wide range of application, suitable for home, workshop, maintenance places, etc. Cautions 1. Do not use it in high temperature, strong magnetic or charged environment. 2. Avoid putting the magnetic head close to the electronic equipment for a long time. 3. Please wipe it clean after use to prevent rusting. 4. Do not overstretch or bend to avoid structural damage. 5. Store in a dry place, away from children.
